# bithost

> Privacy-first cloud VPS reseller powered by DigitalOcean, Linode, and Vultr. Pay with Bitcoin, Lightning Network, Ethereum, and 11 other cryptocurrencies. No KYC, no credit card, no identity verification. Hourly billing with no auto-renewals. Operating since 2014.

bithost lets anyone deploy a Linux or Windows cloud server anonymously using crypto. Servers are provisioned in minutes across 30+ global locations. Full root access via SSH. Manage everything from the web dashboard or the bh CLI. Minimum top-up is $20.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://bithost.io/): Overview of the service, providers, billing model, and supported cryptocurrencies
- [Prices](https://bithost.io/prices): Full pricing tables for DigitalOcean, Linode, and Vultr plans - CPU, RAM, storage, and hourly/monthly rates
- [FAQ](https://bithost.io/faq): Answers on crypto payments, billing, server limits, account security, and balance management
- [Pay with Crypto](https://bithost.io/pay-with-crypto): Full list of accepted cryptocurrencies - Bitcoin, ETH, DOGE, LTC, USDC, SOL, and more
- [API & CLI](https://bithost.io/bithost-cli-api/): Overview of the REST API and bh command-line tool
- [API Docs](https://bithost.io/bithost-cli-api/api): Full REST API reference - authentication, endpoints, request/response format
- [CLI Docs](https://bithost.io/bithost-cli-api/cli): bh CLI installation, commands, and usage examples

## Guides - Getting Started

- [Deploy your first server with bithost](https://bithost.io/guides/getting-started): Step-by-step guide to creating an account, topping up with crypto, and deploying your first VPS
- [How to choose the right cloud server plan](https://bithost.io/guides/choose-the-right-plan): Comparison of plan types - general purpose, CPU-optimised, memory-optimised, and storage plans
- [How to connect to your server via SSH](https://bithost.io/guides/connect-via-ssh): SSH connection instructions for Linux, macOS, and Windows clients
- [Understanding your server dashboard](https://bithost.io/guides/understanding-your-dashboard): Tour of the bithost control panel - server stats, actions, billing, and snapshots

## Guides - Account Security

- [How to enable two-factor authentication (2FA)](https://bithost.io/guides/enable-2fa): Protecting your bithost account with an authenticator app - setup, QR code scanning, and confirmation

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://bithost.io/privacy): What data is collected, retention periods, cookie usage, and user rights
- [Terms of Service](https://bithost.io/terms): Acceptable use, account limits, billing, refund policy, and liability
